mapper.select:
SELECT d.drink_id AS drinkId , d.category_code AS categoryCode , d.type_code AS typeCode , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.drink_name_en AS drinkNameEn , COUNT(l.obj_id) AS likeCount FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN `like` l ON d.drink_id = l.obj_id AND l.obj_type = 'DRINK'
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
GROUP BY d.drink_id
ORDER BY likeCount DESC , d.created_at DESC
LIMIT 4

SELECT d.drink_id AS drinkId , d.category_code AS categoryCode , d.type_code AS typeCode , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.drink_name_en AS drinkNameEn , d.abv , d.price , d.country , d.created_at AS createdAt , cc1.code_name AS categoryName , cc2.code_name AS typeName , IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount , IFNULL(ar.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating
, (ul.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS liked
, false AS liked
FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id , COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'DRINK' GROUP BY obj_id ) lc ON d.drink_id = lc.obj_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT drink_id , ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avgRating FROM tasting_note WHERE is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY drink_id ) ar ON d.drink_id = ar.drink_id
LEFT JOIN `like` ul ON ul.obj_id = d.drink_id AND ul.obj_type = 'DRINK' AND ul.user_id = #{userId}
INNER JOIN (
SELECT d1.drink_id FROM drink d1 WHERE d1.is_deleted = 'N' AND d1.drink_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d2.drink_id FROM drink d2 WHERE d2.is_deleted = 'N' AND d2.drink_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d3.drink_id FROM drink d3 INNER JOIN common_code c1 ON d3.category_code = c1.code AND c1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND c1.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d3.is_deleted = 'N' AND c1.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d4.drink_id FROM drink d4 INNER JOIN common_code c2 ON d4.type_code = c2.code AND c2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND c2.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d4.is_deleted = 'N' AND c2.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ) s ON d.drink_id = s.drink_id
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
AND d.category_code = #{categoryCode}
AND d.abv BETWEEN #{abvLow} AND #{abvHigh} AND d.price BETWEEN #{priceLow} AND #{priceHigh}
ORDER BY IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) DESC , d.drink_id DESC
ORDER BY d.drink_name ASC , d.drink_id DESC
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC , d.drink_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drink d
INNER JOIN ( SELECT d1.drink_id FROM drink d1 WHERE d1.is_deleted = 'N' AND d1.drink_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d2.drink_id FROM drink d2 WHERE d2.is_deleted = 'N' AND d2.drink_name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d3.drink_id FROM drink d3 INNER JOIN common_code c1 ON d3.category_code = c1.code AND c1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND c1.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d3.is_deleted = 'N' AND c1.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
UNION
SELECT d4.drink_id FROM drink d4 INNER JOIN common_code c2 ON d4.type_code = c2.code AND c2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND c2.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE d4.is_deleted = 'N' AND c2.code_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ) s ON d.drink_id = s.drink_id
WHERE d.is_deleted = 'N'
AND d.category_code = #{categoryCode}
AND d.abv BETWEEN #{abvLow} AND #{abvHigh} AND d.price BETWEEN #{priceLow} AND #{priceHigh}

SELECT d.drink_id AS drinkId , d.category_code AS categoryCode , d.type_code AS typeCode , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.drink_name_en AS drinkNameEn , d.abv , d.price , d.country , d.created_at AS createdAt , cc1.code_name AS categoryName , cc2.code_name AS typeName , IFNULL(tn.noteCount, 0) AS noteCount , IFNULL(tn.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating , IFNULL(lc.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount FROM drink d
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT drink_id , COUNT(*) AS noteCount , ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avgRating FROM tasting_note WHERE is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY drink_id ) tn ON d.drink_id = tn.drink_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id , COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'DRINK' GROUP BY obj_id ) lc ON d.drink_id = lc.obj_id
WHERE d.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND d.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT d.drink_id AS drinkId , d.category_code AS categoryCode , d.type_code AS typeCode , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.drink_name_en AS drinkNameEn , d.abv , d.price , d.country , d.created_at AS createdAt , cc1.code_name AS categoryName , cc2.code_name AS typeName
FROM drink d
INNER JOIN tasting_note tn ON d.drink_id = tn.drink_id
LEFT JOIN common_code cc1 ON d.category_code = cc1.code AND cc1.group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND cc1.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc2 ON d.type_code = cc2.code AND cc2.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc2.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE tn.note_id = #{noteId}
